rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE KATHRYN C. QVALE MARITAL TRUST DATED 1-31-2006
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer to the First Amended Petition is sustained without leave to amend as to the Third Claim for Intentional Interference with Expectation of Inheritance (IIEI). In light of the narrow holding in Beckwith v. Dahl (2012) 205 Cal.App.4th 1039, 1052-1053, the fact that Jeff has an adequate remedy in probate precludes his claim for IIEI. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Anyone choosing to contest the tentative ruling shall notify the court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. (10/21/2014).

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE KATHRYN C. QVALE MARITAL TRUST DATED 1-31-2006
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Petition To Determine Validity
rulings.Rulings: The Court denies Bruce's Motion to Strike Portions of the First Amended Petition. With regard to paragraphs 74, 76, and 78, the motion to strike is moot because the Court sustained the demurrer without leave to amend as to the third claim. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling shall notify court and counsel no later than 10/21/2014, at 4:00 p.m.
